sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63413" key="linopte/ruc" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λῐνο-πτέρυξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῠγος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:121" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Opp.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">C.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.121</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0024.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:61" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.61</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
